description: Retrieval eval corpus for life_capture. Items span gmail/calendar/imessage/slack across several themes with intentional decoys. Queries assert top-K containment; optional `relevant` field is reserved for future recall@k/MRR scoring.

items.subject: Project Phoenix launch postmortem
items.text: Postmortem for the Phoenix launch. Key incidents: deploy rollback at 2am, metrics dashboard outage, alerting noise. Action items assigned to owners with due dates.
Phoenix retro thread. Action items: tighten canary rollout, add smoke tests before promote, owner rotation for alerting.

items.subject: Phoenix quarterly budget review
items.text: Phoenix budget review: infra spend trending 12% over forecast due to canary duplication. Proposal attached to resize staging fleet.

items.subject: Phoenix kickoff meeting
items.text: Phoenix kickoff meeting. Agenda: scope, milestones, owners, risks.
Can we push the Phoenix demo by a day? Dashboard still flaky and I want one more dry run.

items.subject: Weekend forecast: Phoenix, Arizona
items.text: Phoenix weather this weekend: 78F sunny Saturday, 82F sunny Sunday. Low humidity. Travel advisory: none.

items.subject: Tokyo trip itinerary draft
items.text: Tokyo trip itinerary draft. Day 1 Shibuya and Harajuku, Day 2 Tsukiji and Ginza, Day 3 Hakone day trip, Day 4 Akihabara and Shinjuku.

items.subject: Hotel booking confirmation: Park Hyatt Tokyo
items.text: Your hotel booking is confirmed at Park Hyatt Tokyo for 4 nights, check-in March 20. Confirmation number attached.

items.subject: Flight confirmation UA837 SFO to NRT
items.text: Your flight UA837 from San Francisco SFO to Narita NRT is confirmed for March 20. Seat 24A. Tokyo arrival local time 16:05.
Should we extend Tokyo by two days and skip the Kyoto side trip? Park Hyatt says they have the nights open.

items.subject: Japan visa appointment
items.text: Japan visa appointment at the consulate. Bring passport, itinerary printout, and hotel booking proof.

items.subject: Lab results available
items.text: Lab results are available. Cholesterol is slightly elevated, LDL 142. Other panels normal. Recommend dietary adjustments and recheck in three months.

items.subject: Dentist appointment
items.text: Dentist appointment Tuesday 10am. Cleaning and checkup. Bring insurance card.

items.subject: Annual checkup results
items.text: Your annual physical checkup results are in. All vitals normal. Doctor notes include vitamin D recommendation.
Started taking vitamin D every morning, feeling a bit better already after two weeks.

items.subject: Your order has shipped
items.text: Your order of Sony wireless headphones has shipped. Tracking number inside. Estimated delivery Thursday.

items.subject: Amazon order confirmation
items.text: Amazon order total 127.43 USD. Items: wireless headphones, USB-C cable, laptop stand.

items.subject: Return window closes Friday
items.text: Reminder: the return window for your jacket purchase closes Friday. Start a return from your orders page.

items.subject: SSL certificate renewal
items.text: SSL certificate renewal reminder. Certbot run scheduled. Verify post-renewal with openssl s_client.

items.subject: Database migration rollback plan
items.text: Database migration rollback plan. Snapshot before alter, dual-write window, feature flag gate, rollback SQL attached.
Postgres connection pool tuning notes. PgBouncer transaction mode, pool size per CPU, prepared statements caveat.
PR review: auth refactor. Extracting session issuance into a dedicated service, cleaner token lifecycle, unit tests added.
Dinner at Nobu Saturday at 8pm? Booked a table for four.

items.subject: Alex's 30th birthday party
items.text: RSVP for Alex's 30th birthday party. Saturday evening, rooftop venue. Dress code smart casual.
Movie night Friday? Thinking the new Denis Villeneuve film.

items.subject: Coffee with Priya
items.text: Coffee with Priya at Blue Bottle. Catch up on career plans and the new company.

items.subject: January brokerage statement
items.text: Your January brokerage statement is available. Portfolio performance summary and dividend distribution inside.

items.subject: Credit card payment due
items.text: Credit card payment due. Autopay is configured but verify balance before statement close.

items.subject: Tax documents available from your employer
items.text: Your W-2 and 1095-C tax documents from your employer are available for download in the HR portal.

items.subject: Your airline miles expire soon
items.text: Loyalty account notice: your airline miles expire in 60 days unless you book or redeem. Flight deals inside.

items.subject: Vitamin C powder bulk discount
items.text: Marketing: vitamin C powder bulk discount this week only. Shipping included on orders over fifty dollars.

items.subject: Weekly tech digest
items.text: Weekly tech digest: frontend frameworks roundup, database benchmarks, open source releases of note.

queries.pending_reason: hybrid_search ignores Query.sources/since/until today; runner skips assertions until the implementation branch honors the filter.
